payload.answer: Cannot commit this statement to durable memory without entity resolution. Requires clarification of: (1) who 'He' refers to, (2) what objects are being compared.

entity_resolution.reason: Pronoun 'He' lacks antecedent; 'the other one' lacks referent context. Cannot resolve without prior discourse or explicit entity introduction.

payload.intent: Resolve unresolved pronoun reference in preference statement

memory_cards.statement: An unidentified person prefers an unidentified alternative object over another

details: Unresolved definite reference: the other one
Memory card created in suspended state pending disambiguation

repair_options: Specify both objects being compared (e.g., 'He prefers option B over option A')
Supply prior context establishing the referents
